items.name_en: Top-tier Original N82068 Grape Purple with Python. This Capucines mini handbag features a refined structure crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather. It is equipped with a top handle, double-flap, and a glossy python-embossed logo, making it a stunning choice for day or night. A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 21 * 14 * 8 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. Established in 1854, the Capucines handbag was named after the street in Paris where the first store opened and was introduced in 2013. Crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, it features a signature flap: the exterior displays the Monogram flower, while the interior reveals leather-covered letters. Dimensions: 31.5 x 20 x 11 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier replica M82717 Purple Mini Shell Bag Series New launch Nano Alma Handbag. Recreating the iconic Alma bag in a miniature Nano Alma version. Louis Vuitton's signature Monogram canvas material coordinated with natural leather trim. A meticulously crafted piece combining traditional charm and modern functionality. Opening the double zipper reveals a surprisingly spacious interior design. Utilizing two leather handles and an adjustable detachable shoulder strap, it can be styled in multiple ways. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 cm
